column1: # Hand overlay for emoji data. This is the ONLY file you normally edit.
#   emoji  action  category  order  taigi_keywords  zh_Hant_keywords  en_keywords  name  notes
# Keywords are pipe-separated ( | ) because terms may contain commas.
#   patch    add keywords to an emoji that already exists upstream. Only emoji + keyword
#            columns are read. Fails the build if the emoji is not in emoji-test.txt.
#   add      add a brand-new emoji not in upstream. Needs category + name; order optional
#            (defaults to end of list). version is recorded as "custom".
#   exclude  drop an upstream emoji from output. Only emoji (+ optional notes) read.
# taigi_keywords: canonical TL romanization (lowercase, keep tone diacritics) AND/OR 漢字.
# Do NOT invent romanization — read knowledge/taigi phonetics sources or leave 羅馬字 out
# and use 漢字 only. The seeds below use 漢字 only on purpose; add 羅馬字 as you verify it.
# Columns:    emoji <tab> action <tab> category <tab> order <tab> taigi <tab> zh_Hant <tab> en <tab> name <tab> notes
